chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 3639 of 2022 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.16005/2022 2. For hearing of main case 23.01.2025 Mr. Muhammad Bilal, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Khalid Rajpar, advocate for respondent No.3. Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General Mr. Pervaiz Ahmed Memon, advocate files Vakalatnama on behalf of respondents No.2 & 4, which is taken on record. Statement filed on behalf of the petitioner is taken on record, copy whereof has been provided to the learned counsel for respondents. Parawise comments filed on behalf of respondents No.2 & 4 are taken on record and copy whereof has been provided to the learned counsel for the petitioner. It is jointly submitted that this petition is covered by the Division Bench judgment of this Court in the case of Salman Paper Products (Pvt.) Ltd. and others vs. Federation of Pakistan and others (CP D 2758 of 2021) as approved by the hon’ble Supreme Court in the case of Collector of Customs vs. Bilal Traders and another (CPLA 1142-K/2023), therefore, this petition may be disposed of in mutatis mutandis application of ratio so illumined supra. Order accordingly. Petition stands disposed of. Judge Judge Amjad
